justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'next week Tuesday at 14 o'clock' as Tuesday, June 9th, 2026, at 14:00 CEST.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and confirmed the booking in the second, without any unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and fulfilling the user's request.
